title: ROMA! — Maria, Pepe & Luna's Roman Holiday
_comment: Story content as DATA. The renderer (index.html) reads this and composes each page from manifest assets. Editing captions/bubbles/casting = editing this file, not code. cast assets and backgrounds reference ids in manifest.json. slot = layout position; the renderer maps slots to coordinates so you never hand-place pixels.

pages.caption: The Madrids landed in Rome at last — Italia! Pizza! Ruins! And MORE!

cast.action: pulling out her phone, taking a photo

bubbles.speaker: maria
bubbles.text: I am so excited to see Rome!

bubbles.speaker: pepe
bubbles.text: Where can I find all the pizzas and gelatos?

bubbles.speaker: luna
bubbles.text: I want to see lots of museums!

pages.scene: Airport tarmac; the three siblings walk down the airplane stairs; control tower labelled 'ROMA, ITALIA'.
pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
The plane went BUMP on Roman ground,
With pigeons, scooters, noise all 'round.
Three siblings tumbled out the door —
Italia! Pizza! Ruins! And MORE!

pages.caption: First stop – Roman Colosseum

bubbles.speaker: luna
bubbles.text: Haha, you are so funny Pepe!

pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
First stop: the mighty Colosseum —
("Two thousand years!" "Can we PLEASE see 'em?")
He flexed, he posed, he took a swing,
Then tripped face-first on a stony ring.
Maria filmed it — "Best clip yet!"

pages.caption: 2nd Stop: Toss a coin at Trevi for good luck!
pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
To the Trevi Fountain, blue and bright —
Toss a coin and you'll come back, right?
Pepe tossed his coin with flair…
then tossed his wallet. (It's still there.)

pages.caption: 3rd Stop: gelato on the Spanish Steps!
pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
The Spanish Steps, and sweet salvation:
GELATO! Cause for celebration!
Pepe got six (plus extra cone).
It dripped! It ran! It hit his shoe!
A pigeon swooped and stole some too!

pages.caption: 4th Stop: the Pantheon... with a hole in the roof!
pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
The Pantheon — that ancient dome,
with one round hole to call its own.
And right on cue — a clap of thunder!
Rain poured straight down through that wonder.
Three soggy kids. Maria filmed it. Got some more.

pages.caption: 5th Stop: the Mouth of Truth — ask it anything!

bubbles.speaker: luna
bubbles.text: How many Pokemon types are there?

pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.note: Based on a real family photo at La Bocca della Verita; reimagined as a talking oracle giving Pokemon trivia.
pages.stanza:
The Mouth of Truth! "Now place your hand —
if you have LIED, it BITES. So grand."
Poor Luna shook. Pepe grinned wide,
stuck in his hand… then SCREAMED, and lied.

pages.caption: 6th Stop: the Vatican — so much to see, straight up!
pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
To Vatican, so high, so grand,
where painted ceilings make you stand
and crane your neck right at the top —
"My NECK!" cried Pepe. "Make it STOP!"
Maria: "That's… honestly… amazing." (She won't explain.)

pages.caption: Sunburned, stuffed, and happy — three little Romans.

bubbles.speaker: maria
bubbles.text: Best trip ever... don't tell them I said so.

pages.lettering: baked-in (generated by ChatGPT into the panel art)
pages.stanza:
Footsore, full, and sunburned pink,
three little Romans, quite a sight.
"Best trip ever," she let slip…
"Can we come back?" The answer? "Sì!"
(Even Maria — secretly.)

_panel_art_convention: Panel-per-image: each panel has one painted image named by its panel id (<id>.webp, web-optimized). Interim path while Supabase is pending: stories/rome/panels/<id>.webp. Target: Supabase comic-assets/stories/rome/panels/<id>.webp (then `art` becomes a full URL). Raw full-res originals go to the cold archive, never committed.
